name: Vs. Echidna Wars Girls RPG
description:
CW: Vore, Digestion

In this world, monsters have taken over and started swallowing people whole. Mirea, Sachiho, Usaco, and TGO-07 are trying to stop them

Mirea: On the left

Sachiho: Crouching in the middle

Usaco: Standing in the middle

TGO-07: On the right

Whether it's because you're a monster yourself or for other reasons, you're trying to fight them, potentially swallowing them whole in the process

It is recommended to look through the personality section to get a feel for the bot, although it's not required
creator: HistoricalHello12
